description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a low-pitched, gable roof. The exterior walls are finished in a muted green color, with a lighter roof and small, evenly spaced windows on each visible side. The front facade features a central entrance, flanked by two windows, and a small step or stoop leading up to the door. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing minimal eaves. The structure appears compact and functional, with no visible porch or veranda. The overall design is simple and unadorned, typical of modest suburban or urban bungalows.
description: A compact, single-story green bungalow with a gable roof, central entrance, and small, evenly spaced windows. The design is simple and functional, with no visible porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central entrance, two flanking windows, and a small step leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a single window and the elongated shape of the building.
description_view_2: Rear view with a central window and the back wall, lacking any entrance or porch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window, mirroring the other side.
